criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: Names Beta(2,2) prior, p-hat=1 failure case, ~0.6 corrected estimate, quantifies counterfactual cost.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Six rungs build cleanly. Minor: 'MAP shrinks toward prior' presupposes shrinkage before rung 5 makes it concrete.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Exact formula plus mechanism plus decision rule.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: Symbols defined on first use. Minor: 'D' for data label implicit; alpha/beta as Beta shape params not defined.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Curves, peaks, labels all specified. Minor: Beta(2,2) y-axis scale not specified.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Mostly coherent. map_vs_mle_curve at t=120 draws Beta(2,2) curve before its label appears at t=140.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Three distinct draws (coin diagram, likelihood curve, MAP vs MLE overlay).

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: Formulas correct. ARITHMETIC ERROR: with Beta(2,2) prior and 3 heads/0 tails, posterior is Beta(5,2) with mode (5-1)/(5+2-2)=4/5=0.8, not 0.6 as stated.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Stays focused. Minor restatement of MLE-as-special-case in unifying formula beat.

topThreeIssues: MAP estimate arithmetic: Beta(2,2) + 3 heads gives Beta(5,2) with mode 0.8 not 0.6
'D' not explicitly defined when first introduced; alpha/beta Beta shape params not defined
map_vs_mle_curve drawn at t=120 before beta_prior_label at t=140 -- legend should precede curve
summary: Strong plan with concrete payoff, precise destination, well-structured staircase, rich board. Primary defect is arithmetic error in MAP estimate (0.8 vs 0.6 stated). Narration mostly complete in symbol coverage.
